landing.hero.title: Stop wasting time looking for an integrative project group
landing.hero.subtitle: Connect automatically with classmates in your DRP quickly and in an organized way. No more stress finding a group for the integrative project.
landing.hero.image_alt: Students collaborating in a bright university setting
landing.problem.title: The challenge of forming groups
landing.problem.p1: Digital fragmentation is the biggest obstacle for UNIVESP students. Today, finding classmates depends on dozens of informal WhatsApp groups, where important messages are lost in seconds.
landing.problem.p2: Finding peers in the same region (DRP) becomes exhausting, causing anxiety and delays at the start of academic work that is crucial for the Integrative Project.
landing.how_it_works.title: How it works
landing.how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to secure your official group.
landing.how_it_works.step1_body: Sign in with your institutional email or browse directly to see available options.
landing.how_it_works.step2_body: Choose among the Jales, Catanduva, or Fernandópolis campuses to find your regional peers.
landing.how_it_works.step3_body: Get directed instantly to the official communication channel for your specific DRP.
landing.benefits.title: Why use our network?
landing.benefits.instant_body: No more days of waiting. Find your group in seconds with smart automation.
landing.benefits.central_body: A single source of truth. Stop juggling many different groups.
landing.benefits.stress_body: Focus on what matters. We handle the logistics so you can focus on studying.
landing.benefits.academic_body: Maximize your time building the project, not hunting for people.
landing.about.title: Integrative Project in Computing 1
landing.about.body: This project stems from a real need experienced by UNIVESP students. Serving the :cities campuses, we seek to build a technological bridge that eases the academic journey.
landing.cta.title: Ready to start your integrative project in an organized way?
landing.cta.subtitle: Join your campus peers now and kick off your project on the right foot.
landing.footer.copyright: © :year Integrative Project UNIVESP. All rights reserved.
